headline: What does Honeywell do? CEO explains core automation mission
summary: Honeywell International (HON) chairman and CEO Vimal Kapur sits down with Yahoo Finance Anchor Julie Hyman at the CERAWeek 2026 conference to discuss the defense contractor's core businesses and the industries it is embedded into, especially as it prioritizes automation.

content.title: What does Honeywell do? CEO explains core automation mission

headline: Will Honeywell's Upsized US$4.67 Billion Debt Tender Change Honeywell International's (HON) Narrative?
summary: Earlier in March, Honeywell expanded its previously announced cash tender offers, lifting the cap on US Dollar redemptions to US$4.67 billion and Euro redemptions to about €2.49 billion, and detailed which bond series would be accepted or excluded based on acceptance priority levels. The early participation results show Honeywell is retiring a large portion of its outstanding US Dollar and Euro notes, highlighting an active approach to reshaping its debt profile alongside its broader...
